name: IM Report: Voucher utilisation by programme

properties.sql: SELECT vch.c_programme_code AS programme_code, COALESCE(reg.c_name, vch.c_programme_code, '—') AS programme_name, COUNT(*) AS total_vouchers, SUM(CASE WHEN vch.c_status = 'issued' AND (NULLIF(vch.c_expiry_date,'') IS NULL OR vch.c_expiry_date::date >= CURRENT_DATE) THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS active_count, SUM(CASE WHEN vch.c_status = 'redeemed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS redeemed_count, SUM(CASE WHEN vch.c_status = 'issued' AND NULLIF(vch.c_expiry_date,'') IS NOT NULL AND vch.c_expiry_date::date < CURRENT_DATE THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS expired_count, SUM(CASE WHEN vch.c_status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelled_count, COALESCE(SUM(CAST(NULLIF(vch.c_quantity, '') AS NUMERIC(15,2))), 0) AS total_qty_entitled, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(CAST(NULLIF(rdm.c_quantity_redeemed, '') AS NUMERIC(15,2))) FROM app_fd_im_voucher_redemption rdm JOIN app_fd_im_voucher vv ON vv.c_code = rdm.c_voucher_code WHERE vv.c_programme_code = vch.c_programme_code), 0) AS total_qty_redeemed, ROUND((SUM(CASE WHEN vch.c_status = 'redeemed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) * 100.0) / NULLIF(COUNT(*), 0), 1) || '%' AS redemption_rate_pct FROM app_fd_im_voucher vch LEFT JOIN app_fd_mm_registration reg ON reg.c_code = vch.c_programme_code GROUP BY vch.c_programme_code, reg.c_name ORDER BY total_vouchers DESC, programme_name
